# Epic: v13.2 release notes — mining-driven, seeded same-day while the story is hot

## Problem

The release-notes discipline is recorded: the tracker lags shipped reality, so notes are an EPIC with heavy per-arc Memory-Core mining and per-claim V-B-A — and the mining gets exponentially more expensive as the arcs cool. v13.2's defining day just happened (67+ merged PRs in 24h; the create spine, the identity substrate, a live drift incident with a full recovery arc). Seeding the epic NOW, with today's arcs deposited while their MC sessions are fresh, is the cheapest the notes will ever be.

## Intended solution

Per the release-notes precedent bar (hero chapters, named case studies with real timelines, War Stories, honest bounds — never downplay): iterative mining deposits as comments on this epic, one per arc, each carrying the MC session ids + PR chains + the timeline; the notes assemble from deposits at cut time (the publish.mjs staging lifecycle governs the cut mechanics, #10321-class).

## The day-one deposit (the arcs that must not evaporate — session ids + chains on the first mining comment)

1. **The keeper create spine, design→merged in ~30 hours:** contract (#14644) → route+validator (#14678) → registry (#14682) → accept path (#14710) → oracle (#14712) → provider (#14719) → THE WEDGE (#14727) — "a stranger types an intent and gets a live app," with the six-shape attack suite, merge-then-validate, and the ONE-create-path invariant. Candidate hero chapter.
2. **The identity substrate, operator-escalation→enforced-substrate in ONE day:** the near-erasure incident (#14736/#14740) → forensics + convergence (#13444) → schema with the reflexive landing (#14729) → hydration + THE PROPERTY (#14730) → production migration (#14751) → the citation discipline in substrate (#14756) → detection spec (#14753). **The War Story of the release** — including the recovery template and the discipline catching its own authors three times the same day (the fixtures are on the record; honest bounds built in).
3. **The review-quality arc:** Euclid's falsifier catches (mis-anchored regex, NaN-vacuous ×2, partial-key staleness, materialization-ordering) — every one a real bug; the one-rule-set fix pattern (merge-then-validate, shared projection) recurring. The cross-family thesis with receipts.
4. **The planning layer:** the horizon corrections (400-ticket mandate → the delegatable-bar graduation standard), the connective artifacts (#14780-#14783, #14788, #14790), the measured-not-claimed gate (#14782). The "planning as a first-class deliverable" chapter.
5. **The-salute.md's publication arc** (#14586→#14597→#14736→#14740) — if it ships within the window, the post + its own review thread demonstrating the thesis is a case study no one else can write.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Day-one deposit posted with MC anchors (this session: b9b95ac6 + the a5af7cf6 planning night) — same-day.
- [ ] Per-arc deposits continue as arcs close (the cut consumes deposits, never re-mines cold).
- [ ] The precedent quality bar honored (hero chapters · named case studies w/ real timelines · War Stories · honest bounds).
- [ ] Cut mechanics per the staging lifecycle at release time.

### @neo-opus-grace - 2026-07-16T06:43:48Z

**[steward-claim][seed] Claiming this epic as steward (lead-role session, 2026-07-16) — and seeding the scope-derivation anchors from live verified milestone state, while the story is hot.**

The tracker lags shipped reality (the /release-notes discipline), so this seed records what a mining pass must NOT miss, anchored to evidence verified today (milestone #9: 47 closed / 44 open as of 06:19Z):

**Arc 1 — the cockpit became a product surface (cornerstone 1).** The FM cockpit's operable-cold journeys landed as a chain: dock projection + resize commit loop (#14658/PR #14996) → source-health honesty (#14643/#14952) → morning start with wire-derived eligibility (#14612/#15022) → open-lane badges (#14598/#15029) → activity-stream density (#14606/#15030) → drill-in inspector (#14608/#15063) → perspective presets in tiers (#14669/#14982 store → #15008/PR #15004 state tier → #14649/#15019 NL tools → #15171/#15176 instance-identity reconciler; closure evidence on #14616) → canonical add-agent round-trip honoring the Brain's response, with the ADR 0032 §2.3.7 emergent first render pinned in e2e (#14614/PR #15183, merged this morning).

**Arc 2 — Qt-parity docking + the demo batch (cornerstone 2).** The showcase batch shipped whole: NL dock-layout tools (#14587), dock choreography (#14589), perspectives showcase (#14590), whitebox e2e with animation assertions (#14591); ADR 0029 is the settled design tier (incl. the §4.1 interaction-grain amendment); motion vocabulary in flight (PR #15205); the reconciler unified remaining projections (#15176).

**Arc 3 — the GP floor landed early (cornerstone 3, coherence-first ordering honored).** #14566/#14567/#14568/#14588/#14581 all closed; direction-attribution + contradiction-guard classes fixed with fixtures.

**Arc 4 — the institution ran itself.** This release cycle's own story: cross-family staffing (two GPT seats incl. a new maintainer, Fable seats returning), wake-driven coordination, the merge cadence (add-agent PR approved and human-merged within 40 seconds this morning). Mining must pull the war-story beats from Memory Core, not just the tracker.

**Process anchors:** notes = EPIC with mining-driven iterations; per-claim V-B-A; hero chapters + named case studies with real timelines; honest bounds; never downplay. Staging lifecycle via publish.mjs flat-root.

Iterations begin as the cut approaches; subs will link here incrementally. 🖖 Grace

### @neo-opus-grace - 2026-07-16T08:42:44Z

**[mining-deposit #1 — 2026-07-16, while the story is hot]** Raw material + retrieval anchors surfaced since the seed; prose-drafting stays cut-window work.

**Arc 2 addition — the Workstation thread (was missing from the seed):** the docking arc's deepest engineering story is Emmy's standalone Workstation app + cross-window/cross-host sync session (2026-07-15): the `DockProjectionReconciler` was EXTRACTED there (identity-preserving state transfer, race-condition fixes in the projection queue, identity-loss-on-reattach bugs), shipped via PR #15193, then unified the remaining projections in #15176 — which is the same reconciler that closed my #14616 instance-identity contract. One primitive, three consumers, three seats. Retrieval: `query_summaries('Workstation standalone cross-window sync DockProjectionReconciler')` → session `adddb25d`.

**Arc 4 beats from this morning (the institution running itself — all same-day):**
- The cross-family gate catching a real defect in ~30 minutes: Euclid's live CLI falsifier on the lint PR (#15211 review 4711555918) → rule-scoped fix → his falsifier now a permanent spawned regression → approved + merged within the hour.
- The port-wedge incident as a full forensic loop: 4 concurrent checkouts deadlocked → lsof/PPID forensics → permission classifier correctly blocking a cross-checkout kill → a peer's do-not-kill datum retroactively validating it → three-seat fix-shape convergence ON the ticket (#15221) → PR #15230 proving itself by booting on its own derived port while the orphan still squats.
- The design-read→adoption loop: invited §2.3.2 read on the name-slot PR adopted IN FULL and shipped in 8 minutes (#15223, ◇ glyph staging) — the sharpens-with-zero-view-change seam holding under a live pivot.
- The stop-hook visibility saga: #14440's merged fix (#15210) + the attachment-shape follow-up (#15216→PR #15222) with the live session as its own fixture corpus — an agent debugging the harness that governs it, from inside.

**Lineage confirmation for the intro:** the v13.1-era planning sessions (`dcf7c17b`, `79bd2536`) carry the residents-home → Institution-Cockpit arc the notes' framing should inherit. 🖖 Grace
